notes.text: @cc this should not be an issue to me  ->  - **MAJOR verification (plan)** — UserPromptSubmit hook is not included in the [L:1784691442 C:1]

details: - **MAJOR verification (plan)** — UserPromptSubmit hook is not included in the hook validator update (Task 2.1, line 30): Task 2.1 adds the UserPromptSubmit Freshness Gate to hooks/hooks.json, but its owned paths omit scripts/ci/validate-hooks.js. That validator’s current VALID_EVENTS list includes PreCompact and PostCompact but not UserPromptSubmit; npm run validate invokes it.
  - Failure: After Task 2.1 adds the required UserPromptSubmit hook, the final npm run validate in Task 3.2 rejects hooks/hooks.json as an unsupported event. No planned slice owns the validator change, so AC-14 cannot be completed faithfully.
  - Fix: Add scripts/ci/validate-hooks.js to Task 2.1 and its integration verification, updating the allowed-event contract alongside hooks.json and testing the installed Codex and Claude UserPromptSubmit hook entries.
 [L:1784691442 C:2]
